response: This code implements the Knuth-Morris-Pratt (KMP) efficient string matching algorithm, which first preprocesses the input pattern to build a Longest Prefix Suffix (LPS) array—storing lengths of the longest proper prefix of the pattern that is also a suffix—to eliminate redundant character comparisons during search. It then uses this precomputed LPS array to scan the input text, returning the first starting index of a full match of the pattern in the text, or -1 if the pattern never appears.
